hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool.input.command 2>/dev/null || true); echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" || exit 0; MSG=$(git log -1 --pretty=%B); if ! echo "$MSG" | grep -qE "^Ref: (application_documentation/|conductor/tracks/TRACK-[0-9]+)"; then echo "ERROR: Commit must include a valid Ref: line pointing to application_documentation/ or conductor/tracks/ (Commit Policy)"; exit 1; fi'
hooks.description: Enforce commit traceability (The Reference Rule from commit-policy)

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool.input.command 2>/dev/null || true); echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" || exit 0; if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE "(^|/)\.env|config/.*\.env"; then echo "ERROR: Security policy violation. Committing .env files or config/.env files is blocked."; exit 1; fi'
hooks.description: Prevent secrets from being committed (No-Secrets Rule from commit-policy)

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool.input.command 2>/dev/null || true); echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" || exit 0; for f in $(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=AM | grep "^application_documentation/.*\.md$"); do if ! head -n 5 "$f" | grep -q "| Metadata | Value |"; then echo "ERROR: $f is missing the mandatory Header Table (Status, Version, Last Updated, Author)."; exit 1; fi; done'
hooks.description: Enforce Documentation Guardian headers for persistent docs

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool.input.command 2>/dev/null || true); echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" || exit 0; for f in $(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=AM | grep "\.md$"); do if grep -qE "\]\(/" "$f"; then echo "ERROR: $f contains absolute link paths. Use relative links only."; exit 1; fi; done'
hooks.description: Enforce relative links in all markdown documentation

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool.input.command 2>/dev/null || true); echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" || exit 0; BT=$(printf "\x60\x60\x60"); for f in $(git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=AM | grep "\.md$"); do if grep -qE "^[[:space:]]*${BT}[[:space:]]*$" "$f"; then echo "ERROR: $f has code blocks missing language specifiers."; exit 1; fi; done'
hooks.description: Enforce code block language specifiers in markdown (Documentation Guardian)

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(jq -r .tool.input.command 2>/dev/null || true); echo "$CMD" | grep -q "git commit" || exit 0; if grep -r "3\.11-slim" Dockerfile 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Check Python version in Dockerfile"; fi'
